message:
test(core): add V2 superinstruction + ceremony reduction test suite (11 tests)

V-TEST-2: Tests verifying V2.1 (FusedAppendInsert), V2.2 (disabled
FusedOpenWriteLast), and V2.3 (bounds check + metrics gating).

Covers: simple/multicol/autoincrement fused INSERT, empty table first row,
INSERT after DELETE with AUTOINCREMENT, NOT-fused with index/conflict,
halt sentinel termination, prepared vs ad-hoc equivalence, mixed fused
and normal ops in transaction, large INSERT with page splits.

All 11 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
